A very tenderly colored flower.

You can place it using Surf.

HGSS.423.0049:

water. The Pokémon by the

HGSS.423.0050:
A long and thin bench.
The kind you would find in
any park or rest area.
HGSS.423.0051:
A short, horizontal fence.
If you used a few of these, you could
probably enclose a lake or flower patch.
HGSS.423.0052:
A short, vertical fence.
If you used a few of these, you could
probably enclose a lake or flower patch.
HGSS.423.0053:
A long, horizontal fence.
If you used a few of these, you could
probably enclose a lake or flower patch.
HGSS.423.0054:
A long, vertical fence.
If you used a few of these, you could
probably enclose a lake or flower patch.
HGSS.423.0055:
A signboard made of wood. If you
planted a stake in the ground, you
could post this sign on it.
HGSS.423.0056:
A stone statue made in your image.
If you placed this, you could really
get the sense of being a great hero.
HGSS.423.0057:
Your own flag that you drew. If you
placed this, you could really get the
sense of being the ruler of the land.
HGSS.423.0058:
An electric light that illuminates the
Area. If placed in the darkness, it could
create a beautiful path of light.
HGSS.423.0059:
A sign pointing right. Any person who
sees this would naturally want to go find
out what it could be pointing to.
HGSS.423.0060:
A sign pointing left. Any person who
sees this would naturally want to go find
out what it could be pointing to.
HGSS.423.0061:
A trash can for disposing of litter.
If you have any litter, be sure to
throw it away or take it with you.
